LETTER, ARBITRATOR, LAWRENCE E. CURFMAN III; ARBITRATION HEARING DATE: AUGUST 30, 2001 @ 10:00 AM

CAUSE CALLED FOR TRIAL, DEPT. 206, CASE HAS SETTLED. THE TERMS OF THE SETTLEMENT ARE AS FOLLOWS: DEFT. YIN AH KONG IS TO PAY TO PLAINTIFF $6,470, DEFT. RUDOLPH RAGAN IS TO PAY TO PLAINTIFF $500. THERE WILL BE A MUTUAL RELEASE OF ALL CLAIMS. IF THE TERMS ARE COMPLIED WITH, PLAINTIFF WILL DISMISS THE CASE WITH PREJUDICE.
